matchers.value: ^([^ ]{1,512}) GroupWise Internet Agent ([^ ]+\.[^ ]+\.[^ ]+) Ready \(C\).* Novell, Inc\. *$
matchers.version_extract: ^([^ ]{1,512}) GroupWise Internet Agent ([^ ]+\.[^ ]+\.[^ ]+) Ready \(C\).* Novell, Inc\. *$
matchers.note: Novell GroupWise Internet Agent - versions 5 and higher

matchers.value: ^([^ ]{1,512}) GroupWise Internet Agent (\d+\.[\d.]+)  Copyright .*\d{4}-\d{4} Novell, Inc..* All rights reserved. Ready *$
matchers.version_extract: ^([^ ]{1,512}) GroupWise Internet Agent (\d+\.[\d.]+)  Copyright .*\d{4}-\d{4} Novell, Inc..* All rights reserved. Ready *$
matchers.note: Novell GroupWise Internet Agent - versions 5 and higher, second variant

matchers.value: ^([^ ]{1,512}) GroupWise SMTP/MIME Daemon ([^ ]+\.[^ ]+) v([^ ]+) Ready \(C\).* Novell, Inc\. *$
matchers.version_extract: ^([^ ]{1,512}) GroupWise SMTP/MIME Daemon ([^ ]+\.[^ ]+) v([^ ]+) Ready \(C\).* Novell, Inc\. *$

examples: foo.bar GroupWise Internet Agent 5.5.1 Ready (C)1993, 1998 Novell, Inc.
foo.bar GroupWise Internet Agent 8.0.3  Copyright (c) 1993-2012 Novell, Inc.  All rights reserved. Ready
foo.bar GroupWise Internet Agent 14.2.1  Copyright 1993-2016 Novell, Inc., a Micro Focus Company. All rights reserved. Ready
foo.bar GroupWise SMTP/MIME Daemon 4.1 v3 Ready (C)1993, 1996 Novell, Inc.
